prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河南省理科（2025年起为物理类）最低录取位次分别为约17797名、20499名、19248名、17519名、16357名。整体呈波动下行趋势，近3年累计前移约2891名，2025年基准位次约16357名，为近5年最高（位次数字最小），显示报考热度持续回升；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年51人、2022年49人、2023年47人、2024年70人、2025年59人。2026年计划大幅缩减至38人，较2025年减少21人（降幅约35.6%），属显著缩招，将明显降低录取竞争烈度，推动最低位次数字下行（更易录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名主榜约第28名（2026年），为国内顶尖理工类高校之一。盘锦校区共享大连理工大学主体办学层次与学位授予资格，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内，大连理工大学声誉评价为偏负面，主因2023年电信学部录取位次断档至60000名等事件，可能对部分考生报考信心产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频平台有一定曝光度，但热度不及头部985高校。未见明显投档断档记录；依托大连理工大学主体学科评估（第五轮）：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-，共10个A-及以上学科。盘锦校区招生专业主要对应化学工程与技术（能源化学工程）、生物医学工程（生物科学类/生物信息学/生物制造）、工商管理（经济学类）等优势学科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度：电子信息/通信类高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，计算机类推荐，能源动力类推荐；生化环材类明显劝退，金融/财经/经济类分化观望。该校招生专业以能源化学工程、生物类为主，部分属于偏冷门方向，但依托985平台仍具吸引力。河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万人，物理类估算约73.4万人，较2025年物理类55.5万人增加约32%，考生规模大幅增长将加剧整体竞争，部分抵消缩招带来的位次下行效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势（报考热度上升）、2026年大幅缩招约35.6%（显著降低竞争）、河南省考生规模增长约32%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（小幅抑制报考热情）等因素，缩招效应占据主导但考生大增形成对冲。在2025年基准16357名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约13363名，较2025年前移约2994名（更易录取），区间12863–13863名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 生物科学类（含生物信息学、生物科学）
- 生物信息学（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 能源化学工程（含能源化学工程、化学工程与工业生物工程）
- 海洋技术
- 智能海洋装备（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学类（含电子商务、经济学）
- 生物制造（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约13363名（区间12863–13863名），建议位次在区间内考生以二档能源化学工程（A+学科）为主攻方向，一档生物科学类/生物信息学可冲刺，三档经济学类/生物制造保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<12863名）可重点冲刺一档专业。注意2026年新增生物信息学、生物制造、智能海洋装备三个专业，无历史位次参考，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Henan Province Science (Physics Category from 2025) were approximately 17797, 20499, 19248, 17519, and 16357 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2891 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 16357, the highest (smallest number) in the last 5 years, indicating a continuous recovery in application popularity. The enrollment plan for Henan Province Science/Physics Category: 51 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 59 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is significantly reduced to 38, a decrease of 21 from 2025 (a drop of about 35.6%), which is a notable reduction in enrollment, significantly lowering the intensity of admission competition and pushing the minimum ranking number downward (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 28th in the main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), making it one of the top science and engineering universities in China. The Panjin Campus shares the main school level and degree-granting qualifications of Dalian University of Technology, which strongly attracts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of Dalian University of Technology is slightly negative, mainly due to the 2023 incident where the admission ranking of the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering dropped to 60000, which may somewhat suppress the confidence of some candidates. Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms, but not as popular as top 985 universities. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Relying on the main discipline evaluations of Dalian University of Technology (Fifth Round): Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 10 disciplines rated A- or above. The Panjin Campus enrollment majors mainly correspond to advantageous disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology (Energy Chemical Engineering), Biomedical Engineering (Biological Sciences/Bioinformatics/Biomanufacturing), and Business Administration (Economics).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, Computer majors are recommended, Energy and Power majors are recommended; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors are clearly discouraged, Finance/Accounting/Economics majors are divided and wait-and-see. The university's enrollment majors are mainly Energy Chemical Engineering and Biology, some of which are relatively unpopular directions, but still attractive due to the 985 platform. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, with an estimated 734,000 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 32% from 555,000 in 2025. The significant growth in the number of candidates will intensify overall competition, partially offsetting the downward effect on rankings caused by the enrollment reduction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings (rising application popularity), the significant enrollment reduction of about 35.6% in 2026 (significantly lowering competition), the increase in Henan Province candidate numbers by about 32% (intensifying competition), and the slightly negative school reputation (slightly suppressing application enthusiasm), the enrollment reduction effect dominates but the candidate surge creates a counterbalance. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16357, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 13363, a forward shift of about 2994 places from 2025 (easier admission), with a range of 12863–13863.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (including Bioinformatics, Biological Science)
- Bioinformatics (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Energy Chemical Engineering (including Energy Chemical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Biological Engineering)
- Marine Technology
- Intelligent Marine Equipment (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (including E-commerce, Economics)
- Biomanufacturing (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 13363 (range 12863–13863). It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 Energy Chemical Engineering (A+ discipline) as the main direction, Tier 1 Biological Sciences/Bioinformatics can be a reach, and Tier 3 Economics/Biomanufacturing as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<12863) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. Note the three new majors in 2026: Bioinformatics, Biomanufacturing, and Intelligent Marine Equipment, with no historical ranking reference. It is recommended to combine personal interest and discipline evaluation for comprehensive judgment.
